meta.title: {{SITE_NAME}} — Free Video Tools That Run in Your Browser
meta.description: Free online video tools with a difference: your files never leave your device. Compress videos to exact sizes — no upload, no sign-up, no watermark.
og.title: {{SITE_NAME}} — Free Video Tools That Run in Your Browser
og.description: Compress videos to exact sizes without uploading them anywhere.
hero.eyebrow: 100% private · Runs in your browser · Nothing uploaded
hero.title: Video tools that never see your videos
hero.lead: {{SITE_NAME}} is a set of free video tools that run entirely in your browser. There's no upload step because there's no server — your file is processed by your own device, which makes it faster, free to run, and genuinely private. No sign-up, no watermark, no file-count limits.
tools.title: Compression tools
tools.sub: Pick a tool and start in one drop. Each runs entirely in your browser.
tools.cv.title: Compress video
tools.cv.desc: Shrink any video to an exact file size or quality level. The full toolbox.
tools.cv25.title: Compress to 25 MB
tools.cv25.desc: For Gmail and Outlook attachments and Discord Nitro Basic.
tools.cv10.title: Compress to 10 MB
tools.cv10.desc: For Discord's free upload limit. Verified under, every time.
tools.cvwa.title: Compress for WhatsApp
tools.cvwa.desc: Fit the 16 MB media limit — before WhatsApp's compressor smears it.
privacy.title: Your video stays on your device — start to finish
privacy.body: Every other "online video compressor" uploads your footage to a server you'll never see, does the work there, and sends it back. {{SITE_NAME}} doesn't have a server. All the compressing happens right here in your browser, using the video tools your browser and device already have built in. Nothing is uploaded, stored, or logged.
privacy.step1.title: You pick a file
privacy.step1.body: It's read straight from disk into the page — no network call.
privacy.step2.title: It's processed in your browser
privacy.step2.body: Your own device does the work — using the same chip that plays videos, so it's quick.
privacy.step3.title: You download the result
privacy.step3.body: The output is created in memory and saved locally. Close the tab and it's gone.
privacy.diagram.alt: A browser window processing a video on-device, with cloud upload disabled.
how.title: How it works
how.sub: Three steps, zero accounts. Most clips are done before a normal site would finish uploading.
how.step1.title: Drop your video
how.step1.body: Drag a file in or browse for one. It loads instantly because it never leaves the page.
how.step2.title: Choose a target
how.step2.body: Pick an exact size for email or a platform, or dial in a quality level.
how.step3.title: Download
how.step3.body: Compare before and after, then save. No watermark, no waiting room, no email gate.
cta.title: Compress your first video now
cta.body: It's free, there's nothing to install, and your file never touches our servers — because we don't have any.
